Localization.Description: A user created, updated, or deleted a scheduled task

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} updated the scheduled task "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the scheduled task "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the scheduled task "{object.name}" and then deleted it within 5 minutes on host {event_src.host}
